{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chameleon Scales
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10814
|idx=15
|description=If you can get the disguise of a chameleon, you might be able to evade the Demon God's henchmen!
|skill=
|hp=912
|def=146
|atk=100
|rush=80
|gene1=When in Demon Form:
> Gain +2% Soul Chests in explorations
|gene2=In Dragon Form, {race} DEF +20
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} HP +200
|gene7=When in Demon Form:
> Gain +2% Soul Chests in explorations (Awakened)
|}}
